{{Infobox character
| name = Ayana
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Gardener, mentor for the Gardeners-in-training, member of the Council, Consultant
| affiliations = Council, Gardeners
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Ayana Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Ayana is a mentor within the [[Gardeners]], responsible for training three individuals destined to hold that role. She possesses a striking and ghostly appearance characterized by pale blond hair, light pink eyes, and skin that lacks color. Most notably, she has six-inch long fingernails made of solid black iron that function as sharp blades. Her voice is described as a harsh, grating rasp that can sound like wind through rocks or a specter's lament. Despite her intimidating and nightmarish look, she is capable of using standard daggers by encasing the blades within her iron finger-claws. Born to parents who were members of the [[Imperial Guard]], Ayana was abandoned and raised on [[Gray Island]]. She possesses [[Kameira blood]] from her heritage, which grants her certain gifts and makes her feel distinct from others. While she holds a low opinion of the [[Imperial Guard]], she has learned to utilize their abilities. In her professional capacity, she is a demanding instructor who conducts difficult tests and oversees missions involving targets and clients. She has also been involved in interactions with the [[Guild]] and has faced challenges, including a loss to her [[Vessel]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Ayana is a member of the [[Council]] and a [[Gardener]] who serves as the mentor for those in training. Characterized by her colorless face, pale pink eyes, and sharp iron fingernails, she often resembles a black-clad ghost. As [[Shera]]'s mentor, she taught her many lessons and advised against fighting [[Soulbound]] at all costs. Although she is not a [[Reader]], she maintains her duties through tasks like paperwork and uses a whistle in her work. She is known for her stern reputation, having once been viewed as a demanding stepmother and a monster, and she frequently warns that trusting too easily is an invitation for betrayal.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] has sharp iron fingernails.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is [[Shera]]'s mentor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is a person [[Shera]] knows who was once viewed as a monster and a demanding stepmother.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has been spending too much time with [[Ayana]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is a [[Gardener]] who advised avoiding fighting [[Soulbound]] at all costs.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is the mentor for the [[Gardeners-in-training]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] uses a whistle.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] has pale pink eyes and a colorless face.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is a member of the [[Council]] and a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is described as looking like a black-clad ghost with razor-sharp fingernails.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] is not a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] taught [[Shera]] lessons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] has a saying that trusting too easily is asking for a knife in the back.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ayana]] was doing paperwork.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Born to parents of the [[Imperial Guard]], Ayana was abandoned to be raised on the [[Gray Island]]. As an exceptional, older [[Gardener]], she attempted to instill specific instincts into [[Shera]] and once offered the girl advice. She later served as a [[Consultant]], teaching [[Lucan]] that waiting is a necessary skill. Physically, Ayana possesses a ghostly, corpse-pale complexion and pinkish eyes, often wearing a black half-mask over her mouth. Her most striking features include a grating, rasping voice and six-inch iron claws that extend from her fingers and bladed hand.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] is an older [[Gardener]] and is considered exceptional.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] tried to instill certain instincts into [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has corpse-pale skin and hair.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has pinkish eyes.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] wears a black half-mask covering her mouth.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has six-inch iron claws extending from her fingers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]]'s voice is a grating rasp.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] is a [[Consultant]] with six-inch bladed fingernails and a ghostly complexion.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] was born to [[Imperial Guard]] parents and abandoned in the care of the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has claws.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has a bladed hand.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] has [[Imperial Guard]] parents.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] taught [[Lucan]] that waiting is a skill.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] is a person who once gave [[Shera]] advice.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As a [[Gardener]] who inherited [[Kameira blood]] from the [[Imperial Guard]], Ayana serves as one of [[Shera]]'s valued [[Consultants]]. She possesses a harsh and horrible voice, yet she provided [[Shera]] with the vital lesson that any enemy could potentially become an ally. Ayana's history is intertwined with [[Meia]], whom she had to confront as a young girl during an instance of rule-breaking. Although [[Shera]] cares deeply for her, Ayana was ultimately wasted during [[Shera]]'s attempt.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] has a harsh, ghostly voice.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] taught [[Shera]] that an enemy is always a potential ally.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] is one of [[Shera]]'s [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] has a horrible voice.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] is someone [[Meia]] had to face as a girl when breaking rules.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] is one of the people [[Shera]] cares about.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] is a [[Gardener]] who inherited [[Kameira blood]] from the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] was wasted on [[Shera]]'s attempt.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“Patience is a virtue,” Ayana had once taught him, “but waiting is a skill.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Forgive me,” Ayana hissed, drawing out her harsh, ghostly voice.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“An enemy is always a potential ally,” Ayana had taught her.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Council]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
